articles.title: How Aging Affects Foot Health and What to Do About It
articles.summary: Learn how aging affects foot health, from cushioning loss to joint changes, and how proper care supports comfort, balance, and mobility over time.

articles.title: Calcaneal spur detection from lateral foot radiographs using deep feature engineering
articles.summary: Researchers propose a deep feature engineering framework for detecting calcaneal spurs in X‑ray images, aiming to improve performance on smaller, curated datasets.

articles.title: Your running shoes probably don't have arch support — these pairs do
articles.summary: A practical round‑up of running shoes with built‑in arch support for high, flat and neutral arches, from brands like Brooks, Asics and On.

articles.title: Diabetic foot complications prevention: Stopping amputation before it starts
articles.summary: An article outlining how early detection, regular foot checks and patient education can dramatically reduce the risk of diabetes‑related amputations.

articles.title: Dixon Elks free children's podiatry clinic is April 21
articles.summary: A community clinic offering free podiatry reviews for children, with a focus on bone and joint development and common concerns like in‑ or out‑toeing and foot pain.

articles.title: Protecting Foot Health When You Have Inflammatory Arthritis
articles.summary: Guidance on how inflammatory arthritis affects the feet and ankles, and practical steps patients can take to protect joint health and stay mobile.
